scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @euclid-forge/core && npm run typecheck -w euclid-forge
scripts.test: npm run test -w @euclid-forge/core && npm run test -w euclid-forge
scripts.check: npm run check:boundaries && npm run check:core && npm run check:forge
scripts.format: npm run format -w @euclid-forge/core && npm run format -w euclid-forge
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check -w @euclid-forge/core && npm run format:check -w euclid-forge
